terms.title: Terms of Use and Privacy Policy
terms.description: To continue using ArenaCup, you must read and accept our terms of use.
terms.read_agree: I have read and agree to the Terms of Use and Privacy Policy

1.title: 1. Financial Liability Disclaimer
1.content_1: ArenaCup is a tool designed exclusively for entertainment and social organization of sports predictions among private groups of friends, family, or colleagues.
1.content_warning: THE APP DOES NOT PERFORM, INTERMEDIATE, PROCESS, OR GUARANTEE FINANCIAL TRANSACTIONS OF ANY KIND.
1.content_2: Any financial agreements, quota payments, or prize distributions are the sole and private responsibility of the participants. ArenaCup does not have a 'virtual wallet', does not hold funds, and does not audit payments.

2.title: 2. Legal Nature
2.content: This app is not classified as a betting house or gambling operation under current legislation, as it operates under the principle of a private social circle and does not profit from any prizes agreed upon by users.

3.title: 3. Governance and Rules
3.content: By participating in a pool, you agree that the Group Administrator has management prerogatives. However, scoring rules defined at the start of the competition become immutable after the start of the first valid match, ensuring the integrity of the dispute.

4.title: 4. User Responsibility
4.content: You acknowledge that you are solely responsible for your financial interactions with third parties (other users) and exempt ArenaCup and its developers from any liability regarding defaults, fraud, or financial disputes occurring outside the platform.
